item.title:
The tldr:
→ OpenClaw: Most flexible but breaks too often
→ Hermes: Seems more reliable than OpenCl...
item.description:
The tldr:
→ OpenClaw: Most flexible but breaks too often
→ Hermes: Seems more reliable than OpenClaw so far
→ Claude Code: Love Opus' personality but 98% uptime isn't great
→ Codex: Best desktop app, GPT 5.5 is great, but no mobile is a deal breaker
→ Gemini: Should be winning this race honestly but still missing basic features like editing Google Docs from the Gemini app.
These are just my opinions. Read the post for more pros and cons of each option: https://t.co/JlEeBXNIQR
--- @petergyang | ❤️ 1 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 354
item.author: @petergyang

item.title: I've spent way too long testing OpenClaw, Hermes, Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini as my personal agen...
item.description:
I've spent way too long testing OpenClaw, Hermes, Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini as my personal agent.
The truth is, nobody has won this race yet.
Here's my new deep dive with my honest take on where each product stands, plus the personal agent stack I use right now.
📌 Read now: https://t.co/JlEeBXNIQR
--- @petergyang | ❤️ 9 | 🔁 0 | 💬 5 | 👁 890
item.author: @petergyang
